node.title: UBER If you get selected after BPS/Phone screen round, how many rounds will be scheduled?

article.title: UBER If you get selected after BPS/Phone screen round, how many rounds will be scheduled?
article.content: Will all 4 rounds will be scheduled or they will schedule each round sequentially and each round is an elimination round?

post.content: Can you please share your interview experience?

For India loc and Backend roles, after BPS, 1 DSA, 1 LLD, 1 HLD and 1 Behavioural.
At least the DSA, LLD and HLD are all elimination based. Uber is extremely picky and u know the current job market. If u get a single No Hire in any of the rounds, straightaway rejected. If you get Lean Hire, I am not sure, bcz recruiters just convery whether the feedback is positive or negative. But normally, 2 Lean Hires mean rejected, afaik. 
and reg round scheduling, if on-site, expect till LLD to be done on the same day. 
if virtual, Uber takes a lot lot of time to schedule interviews, avg about 1 per week.
Can you share your experience of BPS round? What were you asked?

After phone screen you might have 1 or 2 DSA rounds, LLD, HLD, hiring manager. if rounds are already scheduled for a day they are non eliminatory but if they are scheduled for different days it might happen that they cancel further rounds based on feedback.
Typically they put 2 rounds in a day can go to 3 also depending on the availability of panel.
